headline: CVS fights law that could force over 100 stores to close
summary: A sweeping new health care law is setting up a high-stakes battle over prescription drug pricing, corporate power, and patient access. The legislation targets a controversial part of the drug supply chain, and it has already prompted warnings of pharmacy closures, job losses, and a looming federal ...
